symptom: drone calls match_glob / match_grep mid-WRITE to enumerate files; schema filter rejects because these live in the 'search' toolbox (RESEARCH phase only); generic error dump doesn't nudge the drone toward the right action
root_cause: match_glob/match_grep reconnaissance is a baked-in pattern, but the project structure is already inlined in the system prompt via scaffold_params + data/*.json for gamedev
fix_approach: add elif branch to dispatch reject — name file_read with an explicit path as the right next action
principle: v5 — structural error message > sorted(allowed) dump
